introSection: Herkules is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Familypark in St. Margarethen, Burgenland, Austria. It is one of the few Kiddy Racers that is operated by park staff.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.

fullText:
Herkules is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Familypark in St. Margarethen, Burgenland, Austria. It is one of the few Kiddy Racers that is operated by park staff.



Red track and yellow supports.

The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.


 * Herkules on the park's website
